---
name: Project 2 Completion Checklist
about: Track required final project requirements with checkboxes.
title: "Project 2 Completion Checklist - [Your Name]"
labels: "p1-required"
assignees: ""
---

## Submission Links

- [ ] Live GitHub Pages URL added
- [ ] Public repo URL added
- [ ] Reflection page URL added

## Story + Structure

- [ ] 6-8 total sections
- [ ] 5+ JS concepts represented
- [ ] Narrative complete

## Motion + Scroll

- [ ] 10+ GSAP tweens
- [ ] 2+ GSAP timelines
- [ ] 8+ ScrollTrigger instances
- [ ] 2+ scrubbed interactions
- [ ] 1+ pinned showpiece with 3+ steps

## ScrollSmoother

- [ ] Global smoother setup
- [ ] Smoother tuned for readability
- [ ] Reduced-motion bypass implemented

## Design + Theme

- [ ] `tokens.css` used consistently
- [ ] Light + dark + system modes working
- [ ] Theme preference persists

## Assets

- [ ] 5+ SVG assets (or approved exception)
- [ ] 3+ image/illustration assets
- [ ] Alt text is complete for non-decorative images

## Accessibility + QA

- [ ] Reduced-motion mode validated
- [ ] Keyboard navigation validated
- [ ] Contrast checked (AA)
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] No `markers: true` in final build

## Reflection + README

- [ ] Reflection page includes required prompts
- [ ] README includes links, stack, and implementation notes

## Evidence

- [ ] Final commit hash:
- [ ] Final deploy timestamp:
